+all_models = []

+

+# Training periods to try

+train_periods = [

+    ('2008-01-01', '2020-12-31', 'full'),

+    ('2015-01-01', '2020-12-31', 'recent'),

+]

+

+for tstart, tend, tname in train_periods:

+    print(f'\n=== Training period: {tname} ({tstart} to {tend}) ===')

+    df_t = df_train_full.loc[tstart:tend] if isinstance(df_train_full.index, pd.MultiIndex) else df_train_full

+    X_train, y_train = extract_data(df_t)

+    mask_t = y_train.notna()

+    X_train, y_train = X_train[mask_t], y_train[mask_t]

+    print(f'Train: {X_train.shape}')

+

+    # LightGBM Huber loss

+    for seed in [42, 123]:

+        mname = f'lgb_huber_{tname}_s{seed}'

+        print(f'\n--- {mname} ---')

+        dt = lgb.Dataset(X_train, label=y_train)

+        dv = lgb.Dataset(X_valid, label=y_valid, reference=dt)

+        params = {

+            'objective': 'huber', 'metric': 'mae', 'boosting_type': 'gbdt',

+            'num_leaves': 32, 'learning_rate': 0.01, 'feature_fraction': 0.6,

+            'bagging_fraction': 0.7, 'bagging_freq': 5, 'lambda_l1': 0.1, 'lambda_l2': 1.0,

+            'min_data_in_leaf': 300, 'max_depth': 5, 'verbose': -1, 'seed': seed, 'num_threads': 8,

+        }

+        m = lgb.train(params, dt, num_boost_round=2000, valid_sets=[dv], valid_names=['valid'],

+            callbacks=[lgb.early_stopping(200), lgb.log_evaluation(500)])

+        bi, bic = find_best_ic_iter(m, X_valid, y_valid, 'lgb', 20)

+        pred = m.predict(X_valid, num_iteration=bi)

+        ic, icir, ric, _ = compute_daily_ic(pred, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+        print(f'{mname}: iter={bi}, IC={ic:.4f}, ICIR={icir:.4f}, RankIC={ric:.4f}')

+        m.save_model(f'checkpoints/{mname}.txt')

+        all_models.append({'name': mname, 'type': 'lgb', 'file': f'{mname}.txt', 'best_iteration': bi, 'ic': ic, 'icir': icir, 'ric': ric, 'pred': pred})

+

+    # LightGBM fair loss

+    mname = f'lgb_fair_{tname}'

+    print(f'\n--- {mname} ---')

+    dt = lgb.Dataset(X_train, label=y_train)

+    dv = lgb.Dataset(X_valid, label=y_valid, reference=dt)

+    params = {

+        'objective': 'fair', 'metric': 'mae', 'boosting_type': 'gbdt',

+        'num_leaves': 48, 'learning_rate': 0.01, 'feature_fraction': 0.65,

+        'bagging_fraction': 0.7, 'bagging_freq': 5, 'lambda_l1': 0.05, 'lambda_l2': 0.5,

+        'min_data_in_leaf': 250, 'max_depth': 6, 'verbose': -1, 'seed': 42, 'num_threads': 8,

+    }

+    m = lgb.train(params, dt, num_boost_round=2000, valid_sets=[dv], valid_names=['valid'],

+        callbacks=[lgb.early_stopping(200), lgb.log_evaluation(500)])

+    bi, bic = find_best_ic_iter(m, X_valid, y_valid, 'lgb', 20)

+    pred = m.predict(X_valid, num_iteration=bi)

+    ic, icir, ric, _ = compute_daily_ic(pred, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+    print(f'{mname}: iter={bi}, IC={ic:.4f}, ICIR={icir:.4f}, RankIC={ric:.4f}')

+    m.save_model(f'checkpoints/{mname}.txt')

+    all_models.append({'name': mname, 'type': 'lgb', 'file': f'{mname}.txt', 'best_iteration': bi, 'ic': ic, 'icir': icir, 'ric': ric, 'pred': pred})

+

+    # CatBoost

+    mname = f'cb_{tname}'

+    print(f'\n--- {mname} ---')

+    m = cb.CatBoostRegressor(

+        iterations=2000, learning_rate=0.01, depth=6, l2_leaf_reg=5,

+        loss_function='Huber:delta=0.5', eval_metric='MAE',

+        random_seed=42, verbose=500, early_stopping_rounds=200,

+        bagging_temperature=0.8, rsm=0.7,

+    m.fit(X_train, y_train, eval_set=(X_valid, y_valid), verbose=500)

+    bi = m.best_iteration_ + 1

+    pred = m.predict(X_valid, ntree_start=0, ntree_end=bi)

+    ic, icir, ric, _ = compute_daily_ic(pred, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+    print(f'{mname}: iter={bi}, IC={ic:.4f}, ICIR={icir:.4f}, RankIC={ric:.4f}')

+    m.save_model(f'checkpoints/{mname}.cbm')

+    all_models.append({'name': mname, 'type': 'cb', 'file': f'{mname}.cbm', 'best_iteration': bi, 'ic': ic, 'icir': icir, 'ric': ric, 'pred': pred})

+    # XGBoost

+    xparams = {

+    # Find best IC iteration for XGBoost

+    best_ic_x, best_n_x = -1, 1

+    for n in range(20, xm.best_iteration + 1, 20):

+        px = xm.predict(dvx, iteration_range=(0, n))

+        icx, _, _, _ = compute_daily_ic(px, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+        if icx > best_ic_x:

+            best_ic_x, best_n_x = icx, n

+    for n in range(max(1, best_n_x - 19), min(xm.best_iteration + 1, best_n_x + 20)):

+        px = xm.predict(dvx, iteration_range=(0, n))

+        icx, _, _, _ = compute_daily_ic(px, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+        if icx > best_ic_x:

+            best_ic_x, best_n_x = icx, n

+    pred = xm.predict(dvx, iteration_range=(0, best_n_x))

+    ic, icir, ric, _ = compute_daily_ic(pred, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+    print(f'{mname}: iter={best_n_x}, IC={ic:.4f}, ICIR={icir:.4f}, RankIC={ric:.4f}')

+    xm.save_model(f'checkpoints/{mname}.json')

+    all_models.append({'name': mname, 'type': 'xgb', 'file': f'{mname}.json', 'best_iteration': best_n_x, 'ic': ic, 'icir': icir, 'ric': ric, 'pred': pred})

+# Try multiple ensemble strategies

+rp = [rankdata(p) / len(p) for p in preds]

+rank_avg_pred = np.mean(rp, axis=0)

+ic, icir, ric, _ = compute_daily_ic(rank_avg_pred, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+strategies['rank_avg'] = {'ic': ic, 'pred': rank_avg_pred, 'use_rank': True}

+print(f'  rank_avg: IC={ic:.4f}')

+

+# Rank IC weighted rank average

+weights_ric = np.array(rics)

+weights_ric = np.maximum(weights_ric, 0)

+if weights_ric.sum() > 0:

+    weights_ric = weights_ric / weights_ric.sum()

+    ric_rank_pred = sum(w * r for w, r in zip(weights_ric, rp))

+    ic, icir, ric, _ = compute_daily_ic(ric_rank_pred, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+    strategies['ric_rank_weighted'] = {'ic': ic, 'pred': ric_rank_pred, 'use_rank': True}

+    print(f'  ric_rank_weighted: IC={ic:.4f}')

+

+# Top N by IC simple average

+for topn in [3, 4, 5]:

+    sorted_idx = np.argsort(ics)[::-1][:topn]

+    top_preds = [preds[i] for i in sorted_idx]

+    top_avg = np.mean(top_preds, axis=0)

+    ic, icir, ric, _ = compute_daily_ic(top_avg, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+    strategies[f'top{topn}_avg'] = {'ic': ic, 'pred': top_avg}

+    print(f'  top{topn}_avg: IC={ic:.4f} ({[names[i] for i in sorted_idx]})')

+

+# Top N rank average

+for topn in [3, 4, 5]:

+    sorted_idx = np.argsort(ics)[::-1][:topn]

+    top_rp = [rp[i] for i in sorted_idx]

+    top_rank_avg = np.mean(top_rp, axis=0)

+    ic, icir, ric, _ = compute_daily_ic(top_rank_avg, y_valid.values, X_valid.index)

+    strategies[f'top{topn}_rank_avg'] = {'ic': ic, 'pred': top_rank_avg, 'use_rank': True}

+    print(f'  top{topn}_rank_avg: IC={ic:.4f}')

+

+# Select best strategy - but favor robust ones

+# Use simple_avg as default (most robust to overfitting)

+best_strat = 'simple_avg'

+best_ic = strategies['simple_avg']['ic']

+for sname, sdata in strategies.items():

+    if sdata['ic'] > best_ic:

+        best_ic = sdata['ic']

+        best_strat = sname

+

+print(f'\nBest strategy: {best_strat} with IC={best_ic:.4f}')

+

+# Also save simple_avg and rank_avg configs for testing

+for sname in ['simple_avg', 'rank_avg', best_strat]:

+    sdata = strategies[sname]

+    use_rank = sdata.get('use_rank', False)

+    if use_rank:

+        # For rank average, all models get equal weight

+        model_configs = [{'type': m['type'], 'file': m['file'], 'best_iteration': m['best_iteration'], 'weight': 1.0/len(all_models)} for m in all_models]

+    else:

+        model_configs = [{'type': m['type'], 'file': m['file'], 'best_iteration': m['best_iteration'], 'weight': 1.0/len(all_models)} for m in all_models]

+    

+    config = {

+        'models': model_configs,

+        'feature_names': feature_names,

+        'use_rank_ensemble': use_rank,

+        'strategy': sname,

+        'val_ic': float(sdata['ic']),

+    }

+    fname = f'checkpoints/ensemble_config_{sname}.json'

+    with open(fname, 'w') as f:
